name: AREthRemoveValue
title: AREthRemoveValue
syntax: long AREthRemoveValue( dword objectHandle, char valuePath[]);
description: This function can be used to remove a value in the object specified in the objectHandle parameter. The value is removed in this case via symbolic access paths.
The function may be used on entries of dynamic arrays or optional values which shall be removed. In the case of arrays successive entries are moved forward.

parameters.name: objectHandle
parameters.description: Handle to a AUTOSAR Eth IL object, which must be completely described in the FIBEX database.The following objects are supported. Messages Fields Method calls: Handle to a method call that was created with AREthCreateMethodCall.

parameters.name: valuePath
parameters.description: Access path of the value to be read out.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
